info.title: Threema Broadcast API
info.description: Threema Broadcast is a service that enables secure, automated messaging to groups or individuals, ideal for notifications, alerts and team communication.

get.description: Retrieve all bots for the given broadcast identity.

post.description: Create a new bot for the given broadcast identity.

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific bot.

put.description: Set the bot state to active or deleted.

get.description: List all commands for a specific bot.

post.description: Create a new command for a specific bot.

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific bot command.
Retrieve all distribution lists for the given broadcast identity.
Retrieve details of a specific distribution list.
Retrieve messages from a distribution list.

post.description: Send a message to a distribution list. Maximum message body: 3500 bytes per translation.

get.description: Retrieve delivery statistics for a specific message.
Retrieve the file content of a message. Only outgoing files are viewable.
Retrieve recipients of a distribution list.

post.description: Add recipients to a distribution list. Recipient-to-group ratio cannot exceed 1:10.

delete.description: Remove recipients from a distribution list.

filterInvalid.description: Whether to filter out invalid recipients

recipients.description: List of recipient identifiers to remove
